# Sentinel AI

> Sentinel AI is an autonomous safety monitoring platform that continuously analyzes live camera feeds and uploaded media to detect, classify, and respond to incidents in real time.

Sentinel AI uses Gemini Vision to detect anomalies such as fire, intrusion, accidents, and congestion across webcam, mobile, and uploaded video sources. Each detection produces a severity score, confidence level, and AI-generated emergency response recommendations.

## Pages

- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an operator account to access the Sentinel AI console.

## Optional

- [Main monitoring](/): Live multi-camera anomaly monitoring console (requires sign-in).
- [AI Vision](/vision): Upload an image or video frame for Gemini Vision analysis (requires sign-in).
- [Incidents](/incidents): Full incident history filterable by severity (requires sign-in).
- [Analytics](/analytics): Detection trends and severity distribution (requires sign-in).
- [Reports](/reports): Download PDF incident reports (requires sign-in).
